description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a long, cylindrical barrel featuring ribbed texturing along its length for grip and heat dissipation. The receiver and barrel are finished in a dark, glossy metal, with metallic highlights visible at the muzzle and action. The fore-end is ribbed and appears to be made of a durable polymer or composite, designed for manual operation. The trigger guard is compact and rounded, providing protection for the trigger mechanism. The shotgun lacks a traditional full stock, instead featuring a pistol grip for enhanced maneuverability in close quarters. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible screws and mechanical details indicating robust construction.
description: A dark, pump-action shotgun with a ribbed fore-end, pistol grip, and a long, cylindrical barrel. The finish is glossy with metallic and polymer components.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, ribbed fore-end, and the compact trigger guard beneath the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the ribbed barrel, receiver, and the pistol grip at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the end cap of the barrel, the ribbed fore-end, and the back of the pistol grip.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the barrel, receiver, and the metallic details near the action and grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ribbed fore-end and a long, cylindrical profile
attribute_trigger_guard_design: compact, rounded trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
